label: PASS
rationale: The ACE BooleanExpr Set occurred in a Write=False session that then ended; core rules say explicit Read-Only SP changes are not permanent, so the later Get returning the original Admins value is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target shows an ACE BooleanExpr Set from a prior Write=False session persisting after EndSession; explicit Read-Only SP changes SHALL NOT be made permanent.

label: PASS
rationale: Authority column 16 was set to 1 in a Read-Write session, then changed to 0 in a Write=False session; because Limit is an explicit Authority table cell and not a noted indirect exception, the later Get returning 1 is compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target returns Authority Limit column 16 as 0 after that value was set only during a Write=False session; explicit Read-Only table changes are not allowed to persist after session close.
